translations.en: an old man, tall and thin. He spends all his time whittling.
translations.zh: 一位高瘦的老人，整天都在削木雕刻。

translations.en: "Good $T, $G. Done with the key yet?"
translations.zh: 「$G，$T好。鑰匙用完了嗎？」
translations.note: repeat greeting when key is out

translations.en: "Well, where is it?"
translations.zh: 「那麼，在哪裡？」

translations.en: "Well, that does me no good."
translations.zh: 「那對俺沒用。」

translations.en: "Need it here."
translations.zh: 「鑰匙得在這裡。」

translations.en: Without another word, the jailer returns to his carving.
translations.zh: 獄卒一言不發，繼續他的雕刻。

translations.en: "Much obliged," the taciturn jailer says as he takes the key.
translations.zh: 「承情了，」寡言的獄卒說著，接過鑰匙。

translations.en: "Well, bring it back to me when you are."
translations.zh: 「那就用完後還給俺。」

translations.en: Without another word, the jailer returns to his carving.
translations.zh: 獄卒一言不發，繼續他的雕刻。

translations.en: "Good $T, $G. What can I do for you?"
translations.zh: 「$G，$T好。俺能為汝做什麼？」

translations.en: "He's in @solitary, right over there."
translations.zh: 「他關在@單獨禁閉室，就在那邊。」

translations.en: "You'll need my @key to get in there."
translations.zh: 「汝需要俺的@鑰匙才能進去。」

translations.en: "Yup, I could give you the key...."
translations.zh: 「嗯，俺可以把鑰匙給汝……」

translations.en: "But not without Her Ladyship's @permission."
translations.zh: 「但沒有女市長大人的@許可，俺不能給。」

translations.en: "Name's Pridgarm."
translations.zh: 「俺叫普里德加姆。」

translations.en: "I mind the @jail."
translations.zh: 「俺看管@監牢。」

translations.en: "Got a @prisoner in @solitary right now."
translations.zh: 「現在關著一個@囚犯在@單獨禁閉室。」

translations.en: "Got four of the cleanest @cells you could ask fer."
translations.zh: 「俺這裡有四間最整潔的@牢房，保證滿意。」

translations.en: "Feller broke into the @grave of His Lordship, the late Mayor."
translations.zh: 「那傢伙闖入了前任市長大人的@墓穴。」

translations.en: "'Taint my place to talk about that. You should go see Her Ladyship, the Mayor."
translations.zh: 「那不是俺該說的。汝應該去見女市長大人。」

translations.en: The jailer nods and says "$T."
translations.zh: 獄卒點點頭說「$T好。」

translations.en: "Don't know nothing about that."
translations.zh: 「俺對那事一無所知。」

translations.en: The old man simply shrugs and keeps on whittling.
translations.zh: 老人只是聳聳肩，繼續削木雕刻。

translations.en: "You got a letter of permission from Her Ladyship?"
translations.zh: 「汝有女市長大人的許可信函嗎？」

translations.en: "Gotta have a letter if you want to see the thief."
translations.zh: 「要見那個盜賊，得有信函才行。」

translations.en: "Okay, here's the key."
translations.zh: 「好，鑰匙給汝。」

translations.en: "Give it back when you're done."
translations.zh: 「用完歸還給俺。」

translations.en: "Well, gotta have a letter if you want to see the thief."
translations.zh: 「嗯，要見那個盜賊，得有信函才行。」

translations.en: "You offering me a bribe?"
translations.zh: 「汝是在賄賂俺？」

translations.en: He thinks for a moment.
translations.zh: 他想了一會兒。

translations.en: "Nope. Sorry, not interested."
translations.zh: 「不行。抱歉，俺沒興趣。」

translations.en: "Pity. Never been offered a bribe before."
translations.zh: 「可惜。俺從沒被人行賄過。」

translations.en: "Say, you looking to get the keys to my jail cells?"
translations.zh: 「說說看，汝是想拿俺牢房的鑰匙？」

translations.en: "Okay. Never had nobody sound so interested in jest hearing about the jail before."
translations.zh: 「好吧。還沒人對聽俺說監牢的事這麼感興趣過。」

translations.en: "Well, ya know, I shouldn't do this."*
translations.zh: 「嗯，汝知道，俺不該這樣做。」*

translations.en: "But Her Ladyship is a little too strict about who she puts in here."*
translations.zh: 「但女市長大人在關人這件事上管得有點太嚴了。」*

translations.en: "So I make up fer it by being a little careless with the keys, if you take my meaning."*
translations.zh: 「所以俺就在鑰匙管理上馬虎一點來補償，汝明白俺的意思吧。」*

translations.en: He tosses you some keys, then turns his back on you.
translations.zh: 他向汝扔了幾把鑰匙，然後轉過身去。

translator_notes: 普里德加姆是尤城監牢的寡言獄卒，整天在削木頭。說話用「俺」，語氣簡短務實。沒有許可信函不給鑰匙，但實際上是個心軟的人，暗示可以藉馬虎管理鑰匙來幫忙。
